title: Rainbow Debris
description: This pack makes ancient debris rainbow, does not make anything else netherite related rainbow.
body:
This texture pack makes ancient debris rainbow because the original ancient debris texture somewhat blends in with the netherrack.


<details>
<summary>Ancient debris in it's natural habitat.</summary>

![as we can see, this is some ancient debris in it's natural habitat.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6376177bab800634ac4953e7d5d940e27d2824d1.png)

</details>



Sometime in the future I will be making a seperate version with **animated ancient debris,** just so it's even easier to notice next to netherrack.
